name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Beige Small Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Upgraded Off-White
This small shopping bag is made of classic Visetos, continuing the Liz bag's traditional elegance in daily life. The other side of the bag is made of Cubic classic print, adding another layer of design depth. The lightweight silhouette can be adjusted via a leather drawstring on the side to adapt to the dynamic changes of modern life. The detachable zippered clutch can serve as a classic shoulder bag for short trips and night outs, becoming the highlight of this bag's design.
Size: 29*14*25cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Beige / Beige 🖱️
